title: World Cup quiz: Can you name every finalist?
summary: A quiz testing knowledge of World Cup finalists as the tournament's final match approaches. The piece provides trivia engagement for fans interested in the teams that reached the finals.
content: As we approach Sunday's World Cup final, test your knowledge of the teams who have made it to this stage before.

title: Birmingham City sign Canada defender Levasseur
summary: WSL newcomers Birmingham City have signed Canadian international defender Marie Levasseur. The signing adds defensive depth to the newly promoted club.

title: How World Cup final could be pivotal in Ballon d'Or race
summary: With the Ballon d'Or race being unusually competitive, the World Cup final could significantly influence the 2026 award winner. Strong individual performances in the final may determine voting outcomes.
content: With the Ballon d'Or race tighter than ever before, BBC Sport looks at how the World Cup final could determine the 2026 winner.

zh.title: 世界杯决赛将如何影响金球奖竞争
zh.summary: 由于金球奖竞争异常激烈，世界杯决赛可能对2026年金球奖获奖者产生重大影响。决赛中的杰出个人表现可能会决定投票结果。

title: Pele at the Azteca? England in '66? Ranking the best World Cup finals
summary: BBC Sport ranks the greatest World Cup finals in history, including Pelé's 1970 victory at the Azteca, Messi's 2022 triumph, and England's 1966 home victory. The ranking evaluates finals based on historical significance and sporting drama.
content: Pele and Brazil at the Azteca in 1970? Lionel Messi's first World Cup? England winning it on home soil in 1966? BBC Sport attempts to rank the best finals.

zh.title: 球王在阿兹特克？英格兰在66年？排名最伟大的世界杯决赛
zh.summary: 英国广播公司体育频道排名历史上最伟大的世界杯决赛，包括贝利1970年在阿兹特克体育场的胜利、梅西2022年的胜利和英格兰1966年的主场胜利。该排名根据历史意义和体育戏剧性来评估决赛。

title: Tuchel did not deliver, but his time with England is not up - Shearer
summary: Alan Shearer suggests England manager Thomas Tuchel will not be discouraged by criticism following the World Cup semi-final loss. Shearer believes Tuchel's tenure with England is far from over despite the disappointing result.
content: Former England captain Alan Shearer says Three Lions boss Thomas Tuchel will not be fazed by criticism he has faced over the World Cup semi-final defeat.

zh.title: 图赫尔没有交出成绩，但他在英格兰的时代还没有结束——谢勒
zh.summary: 阿兰·谢勒表示，英格兰主教练托马斯·图赫尔不会因为世界杯半决赛失败后的批评而感到沮丧。尽管结果令人失望，谢勒认为图赫尔在英格兰的任期还远未结束。

title: West Ham captain Bowen to stay at club
summary: West Ham United captain Jarrod Bowen will remain with the club for the upcoming Championship season. The retention of the captain provides leadership continuity during the team's adjustment to a new division.
content: West Ham United captain Jarrod Bowen will stay at the club for the forthcoming season in the Championship.

title: Underdogs, history and late goals - Africa's World Cup
summary: The 2026 World Cup featured Africa's largest-ever representation at the finals, but five African teams were eliminated by late goals. Underdogs like Cape Verde impressed despite the continent's disappointing late exits.
content: The 2026 World Cup saw Africa send its largest ever contingent to the finals, but five sides were eliminated by late goals as underdogs Cape Verde impressed.

zh.title: 黑马、历史和补时进球——非洲的世界杯

title: What happened at Man City's loans exhibition day?
summary: Manchester City hosted clubs at their training ground to showcase available loan talent during the summer transfer window. The exhibition displays the depth of City's squad and creates opportunities for other clubs to acquire players.

title: Defender Esteve leaves Burnley to join RB Leipzig
summary: Former France Under-21 defender Maxime Esteve has left Burnley to join Bundesliga side RB Leipzig for £27.3 million. The move represents a step up to a stronger league after his Championship experience.
content: Former France Under-21s defender Maxime Esteve leaves Burnley to join Bundesliga club RB Leipzig for a reported fee of £27.3m.

title: How have missed targets affected Newcastle's summer rebuild?
summary: Newcastle United have missed out on targeted signings including Johan Manzambi and Victor Munoz this summer. The club continues pursuing players who are eager to join as part of their squad rebuild.
content: Newcastle United have missed out on Johan Manzambi and Victor Munoz this summer, but the club are targeting players who are "desperate" to join.

title: Spain 2010 v Spain 2026: How do the two XIs compare?

title: Thousands of tickets still available for England v France
summary: Approximately 7,000 tickets remain available on FIFA's ticketing platform for Saturday's World Cup bronze medal match between England and France. The ticket availability suggests lighter sales interest for this third-place playoff game.
content: Around 7,000 tickets are still listed on Fifa's ticket sites for Saturday's World Cup bronze medal match between England and France.

title: England missing final piece of jigsaw - Kane

content: England captain Harry Kane says the team are "missing that final piece of the jigsaw" and need to "find a way to get better" following defeat to Argentina.

title: Sheffield United manager Wilder extends contract
